text:

 > Does not fetch: http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/opentaxsolver-7.05.log

The tarball was re-rolled upstream.  The only changes were filenames
(wrongly named *2008*).  Here's a new patch with a new distinfo and
pkg-plist...
